name: Public Storage
summary: Public Storage (PSA) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, acquires, and develops self-storage facilities across the United States. The company also operates a tenant reinsurance business, manages self-storage facilities for third-party owners for a fee, and holds an ownership stake in Shurgard, a publicly traded self-storage operator in Europe.

products.name: Self-Storage Facilities
products.description: Rental of self-storage units to individual and business customers across the United States.

products.name: Tenant Reinsurance
products.description: Insurance reinsurance product offered to tenants to cover potential loss or damage to stored property.

products.name: Third-Party Property Management
products.description: Fee-based management of self-storage facilities owned by third parties, including properties in lease-up/stabilization phase.

partnerships.description: Public Storage holds an ownership stake in Shurgard, a publicly traded self-storage owner, operator, and developer in Europe.
